title: boerhavia chinensis
intro: Boerhavia chinensis, also known as Di Huang Huang Qi, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Nyctaginaceae family and is native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Boerhavia chinensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve kidney function, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and osteoporosis. In herbal preparations, Boerhavia chinensis is often combined with other herbs and used in the form of decoctions, teas, or capsules to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
